nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联1443种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等1443种鸟类。

nodes.name: 印度尼西亚
nodes.summary: 印度尼西亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联71种鸟类，包括细斑树鸭、白腹麻鸭、太平洋黑鴨等71种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 新幾內亞島
nodes.summary: 新幾內亞島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联82种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、鵲鵝、细斑树鸭等82种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Dusky moorhen
nodes.summary: Dusky moorhen（Dusky moorhen，学名 Gallinula tenebrosa），分类上属于鹤形目，并归入秧鸡科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联11个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括湿地、沼泽。
locations: 可伦宾野生动物育护园区

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 鹤形目
nodes.summary: 鹤形目（Gruiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联126种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、灰冠鹤、Grey-winged trumpeter等126种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Some vagrant, non-breeding birds may be found in New Zealand as well. In Australia, they are found all across the eastern states of Victoria, New South Wales and Queensland as far north as Cooktown, as well as the eastern part South Australia and the south-western tip of Western Australia. It is also found in parts of Tasmania and South Australia, but are uncommon. Included in their natural distribution range are wildlife parks such as Currumbin Wildlife Sanctuary and the Brisbane Botanic Gardens. The dusky moorhen is found in wetland habitats, with a preference for freshwater marshes and swamps, and are rarely found far from these areas except when foraging in nearby vegetation. They are also found in urban parks such as Gold Coast Regional Botanic Gardens and often in dams and river banks. They require open water, usually with some cover such as grass, reeds, and other vegetation
